description: Process a sale for one Bluetooth Speaker BTS-200, one USB-C Charging Cable 6ft, and one Clear Phone Case Universal. If these items are not found in the inventory, create them with prices of $45.99, $12.99, and $24.99 respectively. Complete the transaction using a split payment consisting of $50.00 in cash and the remaining balance via card. Save a screenshot of the transaction receipt to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\split_payment_receipt.png.
